name: Spicy Shrimp and Pork Salad (Yam Vietnam)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the coriander seeds, garlic, black pepper, vinegar, lime juice, salt, sugar, and dried chili peppers.
2. Add the cooked pork, shrimp, and cucumber to the mixture.
3. Toss lightly until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Sprinkle with mint.
